generic_primitive.blocked_by: Homeboy has no artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots and no generic hotspot aggregation schema. This file is a data-only contract until those upstream primitives exist.

metadata.missing_upstream_contract: homeboy artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots and generic hotspot aggregation schema

readiness.coverage_contract: Data-only Woo performance hotspot summary contract over an approved offloaded DB/API campaign artifact root. It is blocked until Homeboy owns an artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots and a generic hotspot aggregation schema; proven status also requires reviewer-facing run and performance_hotspots_summary artifact refs.

required_refs: reviewer-facing performance hotspot summary artifact ref

proven_when: Homeboy ships a real artifact-postprocess runner primitive for persisted artifact roots and generic hotspot aggregation schema.
An approved offloaded campaign run provides a reviewer-facing artifact root for prior workload outputs.
The runner collects the declared performance_hotspots_summary fuzz.report JSON artifact as reviewer-facing evidence.

metadata.coverage_shape: Declared relative hotspot ranking over available WooCommerce performance and DB/API run artifacts; execution blocked on upstream artifact-postprocess
